source.body_text_sample:
Skip to Main Content
BOOK ONLINE
join our team.

At relax. Massage Group, we put our therapists first, so you can focus on your clients.

​

Get ready for a job that’s more refreshing than a slice of watermelon on a scorching day!

Here's a sneak peek at the perks waiting for you:​

​

Top-notch pay tailored just for you! Say goodbye to being paid on a one-size-fits-all approach. We value your hard work, gumption and team spirit, offering a clear 3 level pay scale with both employee and independent options to suit you best.

Health benefits that rival unicorns! We're all about treating our RMTs like royalty. Enjoy health benefits (we foot half the bill!) covering 90% of meds, 80% of dental and paramedical services, and even throw in life insurance too.

A group of colleagues who genuinely care about you! Teammates who lift you up during the highs, stand by you through the lows, and bring the snacks. (#potluckchamps)

Fancy electric tables with all the bells and whistles! Let the table do the hard work while you treat to your hearts content.

A jam-packed schedule! Count on it. Our marketing magic brings in new clients, you do you to keep them coming back.

Flexibility galore! Whether you prefer a chill 3 clients a day or a buzzing 6, or work 3, 4 or 5 days a week, we've got your back.

Infinite vacation days! Because the soul needs a good adventure. Just send us a postcard, will ya?

Linen service fit for royalty! You didn’t study to be a sheet-folding pro, did you?

JaneApp,
